derivedFrom.releaseFeatureScope: default (no config/release-platforms.yaml found; every feature is mandatory)
derivedFrom.releasePlatformScope: default (no config/release-platforms.yaml found; every platform is mandatory)

dimensions.title: Framework architecture & orchestration
dimensions.nextAction: Maintain; no gap. Re-qualify on a Mac release run.

dimensions.title: CaleeMobile Client API coverage
dimensions.nextAction: Run the CaleeMobile Client API legs on a Mac with backend credentials (focused-verify api / mobile-api suite).

dimensions.title: CaleeMobile UI coverage (Android + iOS)
dimensions.nextAction: Run the CaleeMobile Android + iOS UI suites on real devices/simulators via the release framework.

dimensions.title: Calee tablet read/navigation coverage
dimensions.nextAction: Run the standard tablet suite on the prepared tablet (full-tester) to qualify the read coverage.

dimensions.title: Calee tablet mutation coverage (create/edit/delete, complete/reopen, skip)
blockers: tablet_calendar_mutation: Create/edit(2 fields)/delete; source-confirmed selectors; needs a physical pass to promote.
tablet_task_mutation: Complete/reopen row-scoped; fixture-absence blocks; needs physical pass.
tablet_chore_mutation: Skip-this-time row-scoped; needs 'Show chore edit actions' + physical pass.
promotion pending a recorded physical PASS with evidence for: calendar_event_mutation, tasks_mutation, chores_mutation
dimensions.nextAction: Physically run each mutation scenario twice on the tablet, then promote via scenarios/promotion + suites.py.

dimensions.title: Cross-device synchronization coverage
blockers: cross_device_sync: Event/task/chore/appearance flows orchestrated + fully fake-tested; tablet-mutation legs BLOCKED until a physical pass.
dimensions.nextAction: Close the tablet-mutation legs and run sync-smoke on real devices; colour-verify + provider-refresh remain external gaps.

dimensions.title: Guided handoff coverage (onboarding + Google Calendar OAuth)
blockers: onboarding: Onboarding lifecycle needs a redeem/activation backend + device.
google_calendar: App-owned OAuth boundaries; one guided manual real-Google check + Flutter harness.
dimensions.nextAction: Run the guided onboarding + Google OAuth handoffs with the permanent recorder on a device.

dimensions.title: Android physical qualification
blockers: no validated, certification-eligible physical report found under reports/; requires a physical Android phone or approved emulator.
dimensions.nextAction: Run the Android serial suite through the release framework on an Android device/emulator.

dimensions.title: iOS physical qualification
blockers: no validated, certification-eligible physical report found under reports/; requires a physical iPhone (or a Mac + iOS simulator).
dimensions.nextAction: Run the iOS serial suite on a physical iPhone or simulator via a Mac.

dimensions.title: Calee tablet standard-suite physical qualification
blockers: no validated, certification-eligible physical report found under reports/; requires the prepared Calee tablet.
dimensions.nextAction: Run full-tester on the prepared tablet and record certification-eligible evidence.

dimensions.title: CaleeShell kiosk/admin physical qualification
blockers: kiosk_admin: Physical-only kiosk/admin suite; needs a disposable device-owner tablet.
no validated, certification-eligible physical report found under reports/; requires a device-owner-authorised Calee tablet (kiosk/admin).
dimensions.nextAction: Run the kiosk/admin suite only on an explicitly device-owner-authorised tablet.

dimensions.title: Regression fixture exclusivity
blockers: distributed (multi-host, same-account) exclusivity: no atomic backend lease primitive exists in the read-only Client API; see docs/DISTRIBUTED_FIXTURE_LEASE_DECISION.md.
dimensions.nextAction: Keep the host-local lock; pursue the distributed-lease design proposal (no product change this session).

dimensions.title: Release evidence integrity
dimensions.nextAction: Maintain; no gap. Immutable reports + provenance + atomic publish are offline-tested.

summary.note: This percentage is a weighted convenience only. It never substitutes for the per-dimension statuses above; a release decision is made from the statuses and releaseGating flags, not from this number.
